story_card: Dorothy Gale  is an orphaned teenager who lives with her Auntie Em  and Uncle Henry  on a Kansas farm in the early 1900s. She daydreams about going "over the rainbow" after Miss Gulch , a nasty neighbor, hits Dorothy's dog Toto  on the back with a rake, causing Toto to bite her. Miss Gulch shows up with an order to take Toto to the sheriff to be euthanized, but Toto jumps out of the basket on the back of Miss Gulch's bicycle and runs back to Dorothy. Fearing that Miss Gulch, who does not know that Toto has escaped, will return, Dorothy takes the dog and runs away from home. She meets an itinerant phony fortune teller, Professor Marvel , who immediately guesses that Dorothy has run away. Pretending to tell her fortune and wishing to reunite Dorothy with her aunt, he tells her that Auntie Em has fallen ill from worry over her.
